entries.headline: Google Expands AI Overviews to Cover Full Trip Planning
entries.summary: Google now provides AI-generated full trip itineraries directly in search results, including flights, hotels, and activities with booking links — reducing the need for users to visit OTAs or GDS-powered sites.

entries.headline: Amazon Alexa+ Launches Voice-First Travel Booking
entries.summary: Amazon integrates flight and hotel booking capabilities into Alexa+, allowing users to search, compare, and book travel entirely through voice commands connected to Amazon Pay.

entries.headline: Microsoft Copilot Adds Corporate Travel Booking to Teams
entries.summary: Microsoft integrates flight and hotel booking directly into Copilot within Teams and Outlook, targeting corporate travel managers with policy-aware AI recommendations.

entries.headline: Apple Intelligence Features Coming to Maps for Travel
entries.summary: Apple previews AI-powered travel guides, hotel recommendations, and trip planning features within Apple Maps, leveraging on-device AI for privacy-focused travel assistance.

entries.headline: Meta Launches AI Travel Discovery Through Instagram Reels
entries.summary: Meta introduces AI-powered travel discovery features in Instagram, allowing users to get AI-curated destination recommendations and booking links directly from travel Reels content.

entries.headline: Google Flights Adds AI Price Predictions and Delay Forecasts
entries.summary: Google Flights now uses Gemini-powered models to predict fare changes up to 60 days out and forecast delays with 85% accuracy, giving travelers unprecedented planning intelligence.

entries.headline: Amazon Business Expands into Corporate Travel Management
entries.summary: Amazon Business launches a travel procurement module allowing enterprises to manage travel spending alongside other business purchases, leveraging AI for policy compliance and cost optimization.
